title: SIL Engineer
description:
**Company Description**  

Expand your career with a fast-growing global engineering team. At SEGULA Technologies, you will have the opportunity to work on exciting projects and shape the future within a company where innovation and engineering go hand in hand. New forms of mobility, autonomous vehicles, the factory of the future, augmented reality. These are the daily challenges for our 15,000 creative talents in over 30 countries.


As a developer with us, you will work with the latest technology in an exciting and global environment. Our customers collaborate with Google and other leading players to deliver world-class Android applications and services.

 **Job Description**  

We are currently seeking a highly skilled **SIL Engineer** to join our team and strengthen our capabilities within the development environment sector. This is a consultancy assignment based in **Gothenburg**, focused on perfecting automation, optimization, and model-based development toolchains.


As a SIL Engineer, you will focus on the development environment, leveraging your expertise in **Matlab/Simulink** within a **CI/CD context**. You will thrive on optimizing model simulations (MIL/SIL) and code generation through profiling and automation.


You should be confident debugging issues related to code generation and unit testing of models, serving as the primary interface with suppliers (e.g., MathWorks) to resolve technical hurdles.

 **Qualifications**  

Technical Profile


A successful candidate will possess a strong background in:

* **Model-Based Design:** Matlab/Simulink toolchains and automation scripting.
* **Programming:** Proficient in Python and basic C programming.
* **Development Ops:** Experience with CI/CD workflows.
* **Bonus Skills:** Experience with Docker, Cloud environments, and Jenkins pipeline coding (Groovy).


Technology Pillars


The client operate as a T-shaped, cross-functional team. While your focus is SIL, you will have the opportunity to collaborate across our five core responsibility areas:


1. Software Factory

* Docker Swarm orchestration and GNU/Linux toolchains.
* Integration layers in Python.
* Microservices (Node.js/Express backend, React.js frontend) and DB solutions (PostgreSQL, MongoDB).


2. Continuous Integration

* Jenkins CI/CD management.
* Pipeline development using Groovy.


3. Build System

* CMake, Git, and Conan package management.
* C compiler/linker knowledge for MCUs (e.g., Infineon Aurix Tricore).
* Batch scripting.


4. Test System

* Automating HIL (Hardware-in-the-Loop) tooling using COM objects in Python.
* General knowledge of automotive HIL environments.


5. Development Environment

* Advanced Matlab / Simulink automation and optimization.

 **Additional Information** **What we offer**

* Secure employment and working conditions according to Swedish labor law
* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Assignments with Segula's valued customers, leading companies in their field
* The chance to use your skills to make a real difference for the future while having a dedicated consulting company as your support
* Become part of a growing network of skilled engineers

Close relationship with your manager who supports you in your career development  
* 

To thrive in this role, we see that you enjoy collaborating and that you are proactive and take initiative. To apply for this position, you must have a valid work visa within the European Union. We value diversity and equality and place great importance on your personal qualities. We are recruiting continuously, so please apply today. At SEGULA Technologies, diversity, fairness and inclusion are central parts of our HR policy. Our services are open to everyone!
company_description: SEGULA is a gobal engineering group helping boost competitiveness within all of the major industrial sectors.

title: Advisory Solution Consultant
description:
**Advisory Solution Consultant – Identity Security**
----------------------------------------------------

* Remote (Sweden) – Successful applicants must be resident in Sweden with right to work.
* Language requirements – Fluent (spoken/written) in English & Swedish.
* Full-time position.

**Who we are:**
---------------

SailPoint is the leader in identity security, helping organisations manage and govern access to
  

applications, systems, and data – for every identity type.
  

As enterprises continue to adopt cloud technologies and non-human services, identity has become a
  

critical foundation for modern security. SailPoint powers organisations to manage access at scale while
  

maintaining strong governance, compliance, and visibility.  




**Everything at SailPoint is driven by our four key values:**
--------------------------------------------------------------

* Innovation – we develop creative solutions to real challenges.
* Integrity – we deliver on the commitments we make.
* Impact – we measure and reward results, not activity.
* Individuals – we value every person at SailPoint for their unique talents.

The job posting starts with our culture, as it is so important to our continued success. You can be assured
  

of a trusting and supportive environment, which will challenge and reward in equal measure. Growth is
  

also hugely important, and you can also be confident of finding a role which offers development and
  

progression, in addition to competitive renumeration and generous benefits.


**What your role includes:**
----------------------------

  

Advisory Solution Consultants at SailPoint combine technical expertise with customer engagement to help
  

organisations solve complex identity and security challenges.
  

Work closely with sales teams and customer stakeholders. You will demonstrate how
  

SailPoint’s platform enables organisations to securely manage access across their environments.


**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------

* Partner with Account Executives to support sales opportunities.
* Engage with customer stakeholders to discover and refine identity and security challenges.
* Deliver compelling technical demonstrations of SailPoint solutions.
* Design solution approaches aligned to customer environments.
* Support proof-of-value engagements and technical evaluations.
* Translate technical capabilities into meaningful business outcomes.
* Collaborate with partners and internal teams across sales, product, and engineering.

**Who Thrives in This Role?**
-----------------------------

  

Advisory Solution Consultants at SailPoint come from a variety of backgrounds, but the people who thrive here tend
  

to share a few common traits.


**You will be a great fit if you:**
-----------------------------------

* Embrace a growth mindset – you are naturally curious and welcome the ability to
  

continually learn and develop your skills.
* Like combining technical depth with storytelling and business value.
* Enjoy collaborating with others and sharing knowledge across teams.
* Are comfortable leading conversations with both technical experts and senior
  

stakeholders.
* Take ownership of opportunities and enjoy helping customers succeed.
  

Above all, successful SEs at SailPoint enjoy helping customers solve real-world security challenges while
  

working as part of a supportive and collaborative team.

**Who are we looking for?**

* You have a strong understanding of SaaS solutions, and how they operate.
* You have a strong understanding or experience in Identity and key identity principles.
* You have an understanding or experience with IaaS environments (Azure, AWS, GCP).
* You have an understanding or experience with AI-driven solutions.
* You are comfortable presenting professionally to a wide audience – including technical
  

demonstrations.
* Your written and communication skills are excellent.

The lists above are neither exclusive nor exhaustive. At SailPoint, we value the contribution of each of
  

our team members - as a result if you have alternative skills or only limited experience in some areas,
  

please don’t be discouraged.  




**Path to Success:**
---------------------

  

Every new SE receives a tailored on-boarding plan aligned to their skills and experience. As a typical
  

path to success:  




**During months 1-4, you will:**
---------------------------------

* Learn the Identity Security and Identity Management space
* Participate in enablement on demo best practices, presentation skills, and negotiation.
* Handle initial demos and discussions on the SailPoint platform.
* Attend Revenue Onboarding for a deep dive into SailPoint sales methodology.
* Hone technical discovery skills during reviews with your peers.
* Navigate internal relationships with Customer Success Managers, Product Management,
  

Professional Services, and Partners.
* Coordinate with AEs before and after client calls, tying what is presented back to business
  

value.

**During months 5-12 you will:**
--------------------------------

* Contribute to building new technical collateral use across the SE organisation.
* Grow familiarity with regulatory frameworks such as SOX, HIPAA, NERC-CIP, GDPR, and
  

CCPA
* Speak at national or regional conferences and meet ups.
* Proactively network and build your own personal brand.
* Articulate the business value of SailPoint as a strategic sale.
* Communicate at business level with clients outside of IT, such as HR, Finance, Compliance,
  

Legal Counsel and Business-Unit Owners.
* Become fluent in the language of Identity Security

**Ready to apply?**
-------------------

  

Please follow the link in this job advert to apply or reach out to the author of this listing for more details.
  

We’ll be in touch.


SailPoint is an equal opportunity employer and we welcome all qualified candidates to apply to join our team. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, or any other category protected by applicable law.


Alternative methods of applying for employment are available to individuals unable to submit an application through this site because of a disability. Contact applicationassistance@sailpoint.com or mail to 11120 Four Points Dr, Suite 100, Austin, TX 78726, to discuss reasonable accommodations. NOTE: Any unsolicited resumes sent by candidates or agencies to this email will not be considered for current openings at SailPoint.

title: Senior ML Engineer
description:
**About Us**  

Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.


At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.


Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.

**Job Description**


Responsibilities:

* Design, develop, and deploy scalable machine learning products with a focus on online prediction.
* Build and maintain infrastructure and tooling as a platform for data scientists.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate ML solutions into production systems.
* Monitor and maintain the performance and reliability of ML models post-deployment.
* Stay current with the latest advancements in machine learning and related technologies.


This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in the office will be confirmed by your Hiring Manager.


Visa requires at least 3 days in office, expectations of these days will be confirmed by your Hiring Manager.**Qualifications**


Basic Qualifications: 5+ years of relevant work experience with a Bachelor’s Degree or at least 2 years of work experience with an Advanced degree (e.g. Masters, MBA, JD, MD) or 0 years of work experience with a PhD, OR 8+ years of relevant work experience. Preferred Qualifications: 5+ years of relevant work experience with a Bachelor’s Degree or at least 2 years of work experience with an Advanced degree (e.g. Masters, MBA, JD, MD) or 0 years of work experience with a PhD, OR 8+ years of relevant work experience. Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field. Comfortable work with multi-cloud setup and experience with AWS or/and GCP and containerized environment like Kubernetes. Solid understanding of machine learning lifecycle and fundamentals. Expertise in Python. Familiarity with Terraform, GitHub and GitHub Actions. Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail. Experience with Vertex AI, specifically in online prediction. Experience with Cloud Run and Workload Identity Federation. Experience with kubeflow pipelines Experience with Triton inference server and TensorRT Understanding of data security and privacy regulations.**Visa is an EEO Employer**


Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.
company_description: Our Purpose is to... Uplift everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.

title: Business Professional Sales Specialist C&P
description:
Empowering everyone to Create
  
  

At Adobe, we empower people—from emerging creators to global enterprises—to bring ideas to life and deliver exceptional digital experiences. Our solutions enable creativity, efficiency, and collaboration across all digital surfaces. They help individuals and organisations communicate more effectively and work smarter in a world powered by intelligent technology.
  
  

The Opportunity
  
  

Business professionals and consumers across the world are increasingly looking for ways to be both creative and productive in their daily work. AI and conversational interfaces are transforming how people tell stories, analyse information, and synthesise insights across documents and workflows. Customers want intuitive tools that work across every device, are easy to adopt, and deliver immediate value.
  
As creativity and productivity continue to converge, Adobe is uniquely positioned to lead this transformation. AI is reshaping how work gets done—and how value is created.
  
The Creativity & Productivity (C&P) sales team brings this vision to life for our customers. We work with named Enterprise accounts to demonstrate how Adobe delivers differentiated value and competes effectively in a rapidly evolving productivity landscape.
  
  

The Role
  
  

As a Business Professional Sales Specialist , your mission is to drive growth within the Enterprise business professional segment across the Nordics, with a focus on Document Cloud solutions , including Acrobat and Acrobat Studio .
  
These solutions power increasingly interconnected enterprise workflows—helping customers understand, analyse, and synthesise documents, and transform them into high‑quality, creative outputs using Adobe Express . This fusion of insight and creativity sits at the core of Adobe’s value proposition and defines the charter of the C&P team.
  
  

What You’ll Do
  
Own and drive the full sales cycle for Adobe Document Cloud solutions, including Acrobat and Acrobat Studio, within named enterprise accounts
  
Develop and complete strategic account plans aligned to customer business priorities and digital transformation initiatives
  
Build positive relationships with C‑level executives and senior functional collaborators
  
Partner with internal teams and Adobe ecosystem partners to deliver customer‑centric solutions
  
Convert marketing‑generated leads into qualified opportunities and maintain a healthy, predictable pipeline
  
Collaborate closely with Adobe Account Executives and internal specialists to present integrated value propositions
  
Deliver compelling demonstrations of Acrobat Studio and Document Cloud solutions dedicated to practical applications
  
  

What You Need to Succeed
  
5+ years of enterprise sales experience, with a proven track record of selling SaaS solutions to large organisations—preferably within the AI, Digital Workplace, or productivity space
  
Strong passion for Acrobat Studio and enthusiasm for selling newly launched, AI‑first solutions
  
Ability to position yourself as a trusted advisor by clearly articulating business value in the customer’s language
  
Demonstrated success working cross‑functionally with Sales, Marketing, Product, and Partner teams
  
A proactive attitude with the resilience to succeed in a competitive environment
  
Experience in prospecting, account planning, needs analysis, executive presentations, negotiations, and proposal development
  
Excellent communication and relationship‑building skills, with the ability to engage effectively at all levels
  
Fluency in English and preferably proficiency in at least one Nordic language
  
  

Why Adobe
  
  

At Adobe, you’ll do meaningful work with some of the most innovative people in the industry. We are committed to creating exceptional employee experiences where everyone is respected, valued, and empowered to contribute. If you’re excited about shaping the future of work, creativity, and AI, we’d love to hear from you.
  
  

About Adobe
  
Adobe empowers everyone to create through innovative platforms and tools that unleash creativity, productivity and personalized customer experiences. Adobe’s industry-leading offerings including Adobe Acrobat Studio, Adobe Express, Adobe Firefly, Creative Cloud, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Manager, and GenStudio enable people and businesses to turn ideas into impact, powered by AI and driven by human ingenuity.
  
  

Our 30,000+ employees worldwide are creating the future and raising the bar as we drive the next decade of growth. We’re on a mission to hire the very best and believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. At Adobe, we believe that great ideas can come from anywhere in the organization. The next big idea could be yours.
  
  

Let’s Adobe together
  
At Adobe, we believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. Learn more about Adobe life, including our values and culture , focus on people, purpose and community , Adobe for All , comprehensive benefits programs , the stories we tell , the customers we serve, and how you can help us advance our mission of empowering everyone to create.
  
  

Adobe is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on gender, race or color, ethnicity or national origin, age, disability, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic. Learn more.
  
  

Adobe aims to make our Careers website and recruiting process accessible to any and all users. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation to navigate our website or complete the application process, email accommodations@adobe.com or call +1 408-536-3015.
  
  

**AI Use Guidelines for Interviews:**  

Our interviews are designed to reflect your own skills and thinking. The use of AI or recording tools during live interviews is not permitted unless explicitly invited by the interviewer or approved in advance as part of a reasonable accommodation. If these tools are used inappropriately or in a way that misrepresents your work, your application may not move forward in the process.
  
  

At Adobe, we empower employees to innovate with AI — and we look for candidates eager to do the same. As part of the hiring experience, we provide clear guidance on where AI is encouraged during the process and where it’s restricted during live interviews. See how we think about AI in the hiring experience .
company_description: Let's Create Experiences that Matter.

title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer | Predictions Team
description:
Every parcel we deliver starts with a prediction
  
At Instabee, our Predictions Team builds the forecasting engines that power one of Europe's fastest-growing logistics networks — from delivery volume predictions to real-time resource scheduling across five markets.
  
We work end-to-end. That means you won't hand off a notebook and call it done. You'll own the full lifecycle: data discovery, model development, production deployment, and ongoing monitoring. If that sounds like the kind of ownership you've been looking for, keep reading.
  
About Your Future Team
  
The Predictions Team sits at the core of how Instabee operates. We are a tight-knit group of engineers with a direct line to the decisions that shape our entire logistics network — from how routes are planned to how we staff our terminals weeks in advance.
  
We take end-to-end ownership seriously. We architect, deploy, and monitor production-grade systems that run at scale across five markets. Our forecasts aren't just nice-to-have insights; they are the inputs that drive real operational decisions every single day.
  
But great models alone aren't enough. We work closely with stakeholders across operations, commercial, and leadership — translating complex analytical outputs into clear, actionable insights that non-technical audiences can act on with confidence. Understanding the business behind the data is just as important to us as the engineering that powers it. The best solutions come from engineers who can sit in a room with a decision-maker, understand what they actually need, and build something that delivers exactly that.
  
We move fast, we care about craft, and we believe the best solutions come from engineers who understand both the data and the business. If you want to work on genuinely hard problems with people who take quality seriously — you'll fit right in.
  
What You'll Do
  
Design & Develop — Build and refine time-series and ML models that predict delivery volumes with high precision
  
  

Productionize — Take full ownership of deployment via robust CI/CD pipelines into production environments
  
  

Architect Infrastructure — Use containerization and orchestration tools to ensure prediction services scale with the business
  
  

Data Engineering — Collaborate on data collection and preprocessing logic
  
  

Monitor & Optimize — Track performance drift and maintain system health across deployed models
  
  

**Your Tech StackNeed to have:**  

Strong skills in Python and SQL
  
  

Strong command of time-series forecasting, neural networks, and tree-based models — built, shipped, and monitored in production
  
  

Hands-on experience with Docker and Kubernetes — containerizing and orchestrating ML workloads in production
  
  

Proficiency in GCP (or similar) and Terraform — managing cloud infrastructure as code
  
  

**Nice to have:**  

Practical experience with stream processing (PubSub or similar) — building pipelines that power real-time predictions
  
  

Background in logistics or supply chain — you understand the operational reality behind the data
  
  

Hands-on experience with Python libraries such as Polars, Prophet, NeuralProphet, or PyTorch — applied to real forecasting challenges
  
  

Experience with orchestration tools such as Argo Workflows — scheduling and managing ML pipelines at scale
  
  

What You'll Get
  
Sky-high office with a 360° view over Stockholm
  
  

⏰ Flexible hybrid setup
  
  

Hack Days twice a year
  
  

Dog-friendly workplace
  
  

Wednesday Tech Breakfasts
  
  

Regular Tech Demos to stay close to what's coming next
  
  

Paid licenses for advanced dev tools and AI coding agents
  
  

Six months parental pay top-up
  
  

Your birthday off — every year
  
  

Diversity and inclusion are very important to us and we are committed to creating an inclusive work environment. We want to be a workplace where everyone’s perspectives and opinions are valued, and we are dedicated to creating opportunities for all employees to thrive and reach their full potential.
  
Our Recruitment Process
  
TA Interview — A first conversation to get to know each other
  
  

Hiring Manager Interview — A deeper dive into your experience and ways of working
  
  

Technical Case — A chance to show us how you think and solve problems
  
  

Meet & Greet — A conversation with your future team
  
  

Reference Check — We'll speak to a couple of people who know your work
  
  

Background Control — A standard check for all hires in Sweden
  
  

Contract Signing — Welcome to Instabee!
  
  

This recruitment process consists of background checks via Verifiera as a review of previous public criminal records. The result is public information that is handled confidentially. This is mandatory for all recruitment processes at Instabee in Sweden.
  
Sound like your kind of challenge? We'd love to hear from you.

title: Senior Mekanikingenjör
description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Products & Systems Engineering
* ID 466235-en\_US

At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.


Din roll  

Som Senior Mekanikingenjör hos Capgemini Engineering Västerås kommer du att arbeta inom järnvägsindustrin, med fokus på order- och utvecklingsprojekt. Din roll kommer att innefatta lösningar för traction and auxiliary converters för högspänningsprodukter, där arbetet kan ske både självständigt och i tvärfunktionella team.  

  

*I den här rollen spelar du en nyckelroll i:*  

* Mekanisk design och utveckling av traction and auxiliary converters för högspänningsprodukter.
* Konstruktion på assembly-nivå, med fokus på optimal positionering av komponenter utifrån hållfasthets- och värmeavledningskrav.
* Utveckling och hantering av mekaniska och elektriska gränssnitt, både internt och gentemot leverantörer.
* Kabeldragning i CAD.

  

Din profil  

* 5-10 års erfarenhet som konstruktionsingenjör inom mekanik.
* Erfarenhet av mekanisk konstruktion (CAD, ritningsunderlag och standarder), särskilt för plåt-, svets- och nitade konstruktioner.
* Helhetsperspektiv inom CAD, med fokus på montering och positionering av moduler och komponenter.
* Erfarenhet av gränssnitt mellan mekaniska och elektriska system.
* Kunskap i Catia V5 och Metaphase (TeamCenter Enterprise) samt kabeldragning.
* Goda kunskaper i Svenska och Engelska i tal och skrift.

  

Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas  

Innovativ miljö: Hos oss får du chansen att jobba med den senaste tekniken och vara en del av ett dynamiskt team som älskar att skapa värde genom innovation.  

Karriärutveckling: Vi bryr oss om din framtid och erbjuder utvecklingsprogram och certifieringar i de senaste teknologierna, så att du kan växa och bli den bästa versionen av dig själv.  

Flexibelt arbete: Vi förstår att livet är mer än bara jobb. Därför erbjuder vi möjligheter till distansarbete och flexibla arbetstider för att du ska må bra och trivas.  

Teamkänsla: Vi är som en stor familj med en härlig teamkänsla. Genom att leva efter våra värdeord som mod, passion, laganda och entreprenörskap - skapar vi en arbetsmiljö där alla kan trivas.  

  

Ansökan  

Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kan identitetsverifiering och bakgrundskontroller komma att genomföras vid behov.  

  

#LI-Onsite

Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end-to-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.
