title: Data Center Engineering Cluster Manager, Data Center InfraOps
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


AWS Infrastructure Services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all AWS global infrastructure. We're the people who keep the cloud running. We support all AWS data centers and all the servers, storage, networking, power, and cooling equipment that ensure our customers have continual access to the innovation they rely on.  

You'll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, and operations managers. You'll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers.  

The Infrastructure Operations organization is seeking an exceptional leader to serve as a Data Center Engineering Operations (DCEO) Cluster Manager in Sweden. You will lead a large organization managing multiple data centers in the cluster, overseeing managers responsible for critical facility infrastructure.  

The pace, scale, and growth of Amazon's data center platform will challenge you. We seek experienced senior leaders who are highly strategic in managing their business unit, yet lead by example and roll up their sleeves when required.  

The ideal candidate will have strong knowledge of data center and mission-critical MEP infrastructure. You will be responsible for maintaining 100% service uptime in our cluster, maintaining a high-level view while diving deep into details as needed. You will interact daily with global teams, representing Sweden Data Center Engineering Operations.  

If you are passionate about customer experience, think and act globally, and want to contribute to the operational excellence of AWS data centers, this is the challenge you've been looking for.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

Team Leadership & Development: Hire, manage, and develop the operations management team including Facility Managers, Chief Engineers, and Facility Technicians. Mentor and develop employees at all levels, including managers.  

  

Operational Excellence: Ensure operation and maintenance of mechanical, electrical, and controls systems for AWS data centers, including preventive maintenance, corrective maintenance, and change management. Maintain 100% service uptime across your cluster.  

  

Performance Management: Establish performance benchmarks, conduct analyses, and prepare reports on all aspects of critical facility operations and maintenance. Manage all facility-related repairs in a timely manner.  

  

Organizational Structure: Build and maintain a sustainable organizational structure. Develop hiring strategy and participate in recruiting events.  

Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work with business development, engineering, and construction teams to forecast staffing needs and maintain appropriate resource levels.  

  

Vendor Management: Manage colocation data center service providers to meet or exceed contracted performance SLAs. Oversee on-site management of shift technicians, senior shift technicians, sub-contractors, and vendors, ensuring all work is performed in accordance with established practices and procedures.  

  

Incident Management: Lead safety, security, and availability incident response, incident management, incident resolution, and root cause analysis.  

  

Financial Management: Manage cost including OPEX and CAPEX associated with all data centers under your responsibility.  

  

Reporting & Communication: Conduct daily/weekly/monthly Data Center Engineering Operations meetings and reporting. Run weekly availability meetings and report outcomes.  

  

Global Integration: Liaise with global teams on initiatives, processes, and procedures; implement those initiatives locally in Sweden.  

  

Continuous Improvement: Drive continuous improvement of operational processes, procedures, methods, and tools. Lead and manage energy efficiency initiatives in your cluster.  

  

Capacity Planning: Support capacity planning and management activities.  

  

About the team  

You'll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, operations managers, and other vital roles. You'll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers. And you'll experience an inclusive culture that welcomes bold ideas and empowers you to own them to completion.

**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* Experience hiring, developing, and managing high-performing technical teams.
* 4+ years of experience operating as a manager of managers AND/OR 7+ years of relevant experience managing mission-critical facilities.
* In-depth knowledge of data center facilities such as generators, chillers, cooling towers, air handling units, UPS, electrical sub-distribution systems, fire detection and suppression systems, and cable reticulation systems.
* Fluency in English to communicate effectively with global teams.
* Driving license valid in EU.

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in engineering or related fields.
* Experience managing or implementing system health, performance monitoring, capacity planning, or process improvement and automation.
* Experience supporting procedures for production or mission-critical environments including ticketing, monitoring/metrics, and troubleshooting technical issues.
* Fluency in Swedish.

  

Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.  

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

title: Global Solutions Architect, Automotive & Manufacturing, Automotive&Manufacturing EMEA SA
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Amazon Web Services (AWS) is looking for experienced and motivated technologists who possess a unique balance of technical depth and strong interpersonal skills. You will partner some of the worlds largest Automotive and Manufacturing companies, to craft highly scalable, flexible and resilient cloud architectures that address customer business problems and accelerate the adoption of AWS services. In collaboration with account managers, you will assist in driving growth across a set of global customers in your defined country. As a trusted customer advocate, the solutions architect will help organizations understand best practices around advanced cloud-based solutions, and how to migrate existing workloads to the cloud. You will have the opportunity to help shape and execute a strategy to build mind share and broad use of AWS within enterprise customers. The ability to connect technology with measurable business value is critical to a solutions architect. You should also have a demonstrated ability to think strategically about business, products, and technical challenges.  

  

Here are some other qualities we are looking for:  

  

Be great fun to work with.  

At AWS, we have a credo of “Work hard. Have fun. Make history”. In this role, you will love what you do, and instinctively know how to make work fun. You will be dynamic and creative, and willing to take on any challenge and make a big impact.  

  

Enjoy working with large, global customers. You will have a passion for educating, training, designing, and building cloud solutions for a diverse and challenging set of enterprise customers.  

  

Have a strong understanding of large scale computing solutions. The ideal candidate will have past experience working as a systems or support engineer. You will enjoy keeping your existing technical skills honed and developing new ones, so you can make strong contributions to deep architecture discussions. You will regularly take part in deep-dive education and design exercises to create world-class solutions built on AWS.
  

  

Key job responsibilities  

* Serve as a trusted technical and AI advisor to customers, understanding their business needs and technology challenges to architect customized solutions

  

* Lead discussions to shape a customer's long-term technology and AI strategy and guide them on trade-offs between short-term fixes and extensible, scalable solutions

  

* Design end-to-end solutions leveraging both technical expertise and business acumen, driving consensus across multiple teams to deliver impactful solutions

  

* Proactively identify opportunities to accelerate implementation through reusable components, parallel workstreams, etc.

  

* Share knowledge by developing technical content like sample code, presentations, workshops to exemplify best practices and educate customers

  

* Drive product innovation by gathering customer feedback, translating needs into clear requirements, and partnering with product teams through development

  

* Resolve complex technical problems through root cause analysis, both for customers and internally

  

* Contribute strategic planning, recruiter/develop talent, build team consensus, and provide guidance to more junior solutions architects

  

A day in the life  

* Review customer requirements and technical challenges, focusing on opportunities to implement complex solutions architectures that can transform business outcomes also leveraging AI capabilities
* Develop proof-of-concepts that demonstrate how cloud solutions can transform business processes
* Influence service team leadership and product marketing on the future needs for customers, prioritizing roadmap features and GTM messaging
* Dedicate time to continuous learning about the latest advancements in AWS service capabilities
* Participate in knowledge sharing activities with colleagues, creating field enablement materials to help other SAs understand how to integrate cloud solutions into customer architectures

  

About the team  

The AWS Industries team is committed to helping industry customers enable their digital transformation journeys. Our primary goal is to meet customers in their cloud and AI journey and work backwards from their industry-specific needs to transform their businesses and industries. Our team focuses on business outcomes and industry use cases on behalf of our customers, whether that is how we build products and solutions, how we sell, how we deliver, or how we partner.  

  

The Automotive & Manufacturing Solutions Architecture team is dedicated to accelerating AWS cloud adoption across strategic automotive and manufacturing accounts. Our mission is to drive tangible business value through focused execution on strategic projects, while enabling scale by up-skilling broader field teams. We work at the intersection of technology and industry-specific transformation, partnering closely with account teams, technology specialists, and industry specialist teams to deliver comprehensive solutions.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* Bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, mathematics or equivalent, or experience in a professional field or military
* Experience in IT development or implementation/consulting in the software or Internet industries
* Experience within specific technology domain areas (e.g. software development, cloud computing, systems engineering, infrastructure, security, networking, data & analytics).
* Experience in design, implementation, or consulting in applications and infrastructures
* Experience communicating across technical and non-technical audiences, including executive level stakeholders or clients

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Experience in infrastructure architecture, database architecture and networking
* Experience working with end user or developer communities
* Experience with presentations and speaking with executives, IT, management, and developers

  

Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.  

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

We work at the intersection of technology and industry-specific transformation, partnering closely with account teams, technology specialists, and industry specialist teams to deliver comprehensive solutions.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* Bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, mathematics or equivalent, or experience in a professional field or military
* Experience in IT development or implementation/consulting in the software or Internet industries
* Experience within specific technology domain areas (e.g. software development, cloud computing, systems engineering, infrastructure, security, networking, data & analytics).
* Experience in design, implementation, or consulting in applications and infrastructures
* Experience communicating across technical and non-technical audiences, including executive level stakeholders or clients

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Experience in infrastructure architecture, database architecture and networking
* Experience working with end user or developer communities
* Experience with presentations and speaking with executives, IT, management, and developers

  

Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.  

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. title: DevOps Engineer
description:
We are looking for a DevSecOps Lead to embed security into cloud platforms, CI/CD pipelines, and development workflows.
 



  





**Role** 




 Work in complex environments with multiple teams, systems, and stakeholders, ensuring security is built into engineering, not added on later.
 



  





**Key responsibilities** 



* Define and drive DevSecOps strategy
* Integrate security into CI/CD and deployment pipelines
* Apply secure-by-design principles in cloud and platform architecture
* Lead initiatives in application, container, and cloud security
* Establish security controls, policies, and compliance practices
* Support teams with secure coding, threat modeling, and risk management
* Act as a bridge between engineering and security



  





**Profile** 



* Strong experience in DevOps, security, or cloud engineering
* Proven track record driving DevSecOps initiatives
* Solid understanding of cloud security and modern architectures
* Experience with CI/CD and automation
* Comfortable working across teams and stakeholders
* Strong communication and influencing skills



  





**Experience** 



* Cloud: AWS / Azure / GCP
* Containers: Docker / Kubernetes
* CI/CD: GitHub Actions / GitLab CI / Azure DevOps
* IaC: Terraform / Bicep / CloudFormation
* Security: SAST, DAST, container & dependency scanning, secrets management
* Frameworks like OWASP, ISO 27001, NIST (plus)



  





**What’s offered** 



* Complex, security-critical assignments
* Collaborative, knowledge-sharing environment
* Opportunity to shape security in modern platforms

title: Senior Reliability Operations Engineer (Sweden)
description:
At Serve Robotics, we’re reimagining how things move in cities. Our personable sidewalk robot is our vision for the future. It’s designed to take deliveries away from congested streets, make deliveries available to more people, and benefit local businesses.
   

  

 The Serve fleet has been delighting merchants, customers, and pedestrians along the way in Los Angeles, Miami, Dallas, Atlanta and Chicago while doing commercial deliveries. We’re looking for talented individuals who will grow robotic deliveries from surprising novelty to efficient ubiquity.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 We are tech industry veterans in software, hardware, and design who are pooling our skills to build the future we want to live in. We are solving real-world problems leveraging robotics, machine learning and computer vision, among other disciplines, with a mindful eye towards the end-to-end user experience. Our team is agile, diverse, and driven. We believe that the best way to solve complicated dynamic problems is collaboratively and respectfully.
   

  

 The Senior Reliability Operations Engineer leads operational reliability by region owning incident response, escalations, and Tier 2 support for robotic and cloud systems. This role drives the creation and improvement of runbooks, automations, and operational processes while coordinating closely with product engineering and SREs. This position serves as the regional incident lead, ensuring issues are resolved efficiently and communicated clearly to all stakeholders.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Serve as the primary incident lead during your region’s daytime hours, coordinating technical investigations, centralizing communication, and engaging the appropriate engineering and SRE teams when escalation is required.
* Respond to escalations from Tier 1 support, using runbooks, metrics, logs, and system diagnostics to investigate and remediate issues or determine when escalation to Tier 3 is necessary.
* Develop and update runbooks, workflows, and operational documentation to ensure consistent and reliable responses to recurring issues, collaborating with product teams to expand coverage over time.
* Write, maintain, and enhance automation scripts and tools that streamline common remediation steps, improve response times, and reduce manual operational overhead.
* Use metrics, logs, and tracing tools (Grafana/Prometheus, GCP Monitoring, OpenTelemetry) to proactively identify problems, validate system behavior, and support continuous improvement of detection mechanisms.
* Act as the central point of communication during active incidents, ensuring timely updates and clear routing to the correct product engineering and SRE stakeholders.
* Collaborate with reliability and product teams to share insights, recommend improvements, and help refine processes that enhance the stability and operability of our systems.
* Participate in a shared weekend on-call rotation to help maintain operational coverage for production systems, responding to incidents and escalations as needed and coordinating with engineering teams when issues arise.
* Help establish operational best practices, refine workflows, and prepare the foundation for a broader reliability operations function.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.
* 5+ years of professional experience in Reliability Operations, Site Reliability Engineering, DevOps, IT Operations, or a related technical support function.
* Demonstrated experience owning or participating in Tier 2 or Tier 3 technical investigations, including triage, log analysis, and structured escalation.
* Experience supporting distributed systems, cloud-hosted services, or production operational environments.
* Hands-on experience participating in incident response processes.
* Strong proficiency with Linux, including navigating systems, reviewing logs, and performing diagnostics.
* Experience writing, executing, and maintaining runbooks, automations, and operational workflows.
* Ability to interpret metrics, logs, and traces using tools such as Grafana/Prometheus, Google Cloud Monitoring, and OpenTelemetry.
* Familiarity with modern cloud environments, preferably Google Cloud Platform (GCP), including basic debugging, permissions, and service-level triage.
* Ability to investigate and remediate issues following documented procedures, escalating effectively when needed.
* Understanding of CI/CD pipelines, deployed application behavior, and operational dependencies across microservices.
* Proficiency with Jira or similar platforms for ticketing and structured incident tracking.
* Exceptional communication skills, especially during high-pressure incidents where clear, concise updates are critical.
* Calm and methodical approach to troubleshooting, prioritization, and decision-making.
* Strong collaboration skills when coordinating with product engineering, SRE, and global support teams.
* High level of ownership, reliability, and accountability when handling operational responsibilities and incident leadership.


**What Makes You Stand Out**
* Experience acting as an incident commander or primary incident response lead for high-severity events.
* Hands-on experience with robot fleets, IoT devices, or edge systems operations.
* Experience building lightweight tools, scripts, or internal automations to increase operational efficiency.
* Familiarity with incident management tools such as PagerDuty, OpsGenie, Jira Service Management, or Grafana IRM.
* Background creating or improving operational documentation, runbooks, or support processes at scale.
* Ability to coach and mentor others, and to uplift operational maturity within a region or team.
* Strong networking fundamentals, including experience diagnosing connectivity issues across distributed systems. Familiarity with Tailscale or similar zero-trust networking tools is a major plus.


**Additional Information**
* As part of maintaining continuous operational coverage, this role also participates in a rotating weekend on-call schedule shared across the Reliability Operations team.

title: Test Lead
description:
We are looking for a senior Test Lead to drive quality across large-scale systems, working across multiple teams, integrations, and stakeholders.
 



  





**Role** 




 You will lead and coordinate testing at a program or product level in environments with:
 


* Multiple development teams
* Complex system landscapes
* Cross-platform integrations
* External vendors and stakeholders



  





**Key responsibilities** 



* Define and drive test strategy
* Lead testing across teams and suppliers
* Improve quality processes and governance
* Ensure end-to-end quality across systems
* Align development, QA, DevOps, and business
* Track quality metrics, risks, and release readiness
* Contribute hands-on when needed



  





**Profile** 



* Senior Test/Quality Lead experience in large-scale environments
* Strong coordination across teams and systems
* Experience with integrations and external vendors
* Confident communicator with both technical teams and stakeholders
* Structured, proactive, and quality-driven



  





**Experience** 



* Agile (Scrum, Kanban, SAFe)
* Jira, Azure DevOps or similar
* Test management tools (e.g. Xray, Zephyr)
* Test automation and CI/CD
* ISTQB (plus)

title: PRAKTIKANTER TILL MURPHY SOLUTION
description:
Är du student och intresserad av att hjälpa till att bygga det robusta samhället och utveckla förmågan att hantera risker och kriser? Är det dags för praktik och du vill göra praktik på ett av Sveriges ledande bolag inom krishantering?
   

  

 Som praktikant hos Murphy Solution får du möjlighet till en spännande praktiktjänstgöring i händelsernas centrum på ett nytänkande bolag. Vi kombinerar mjukvara och konsultstöd för att stödja våra kunder i offentlig och privat sektor.
   

  

**Din praktikdag i händelsernas centrum**
 Som praktikant hos Murphy Solution ges du en unik möjlighet till inblick i området och kan få arbeta med både offentlig och privat sektor. Vanligtvis följer du som praktikant en eller några av våra konsulter i deras vardag med allt vad det innebär. Du får även egna ansvarsuppgifter och projekt att hantera under din tid hos oss. Vi är måna om att du både får lära och bidra utifrån din erfarenhet, kompetens och dina intresseområden. Beroende på din profil och vem du är kan det handla om arbetsuppgifter så som att göra olika analyser, stödja i att ta fram och genomföra övningar eller workshops, planering och projektledning av kunduppdrag eller arbete med våra digitala verktyg. En handledare utses som blir ditt stöd och bollplank under hela praktikperioden.
   

  

**Din bakgrund och kompetens**
 Du är student vid högskola eller universitet och gärna i slutet av din utbildning, där praktik ingår eller är relevant för din utbildningsinriktning. Vi utgår från att du är intresserad av samhällsfrågor och nyfiken på effektiv krishantering och därför kommer att trivas och ha en stimulerande praktiktid hos oss.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som är modig, strukturerad och analytisk. Du är social och samarbetar bra med andra och nyfiken på att lära dig nya saker. För att kunna tillgodogöra dig praktiken på ett bra sätt bör du kunna kommunicera väl på svenska i både tal och skrift. Meriterande är även god kunskap i engelska, då engelska används i vårt dagliga arbete.
   

  

**Bra att veta**
 Praktikperioden omfattar beroende på praktikkursens längd ca 10-20 veckor under höstterminen 2026. Normalt genomförs praktiken på heltid under kontorsarbetstid (8-17). Del av tiden kommer du kunna arbeta på distans eftersom Murphy Solution har en “Remote first policy”, men vi ser gärna att du regelbundet besöker vårt huvudkontor i Stockholm. Notera att ingen ekonomisk ersättning utgår under praktiken. Som praktikant ska du vara försäkrad via ditt lärosäte eller arbetsförmedlingen.
   

  

 Fördelningen av praktikplatser görs efter intervju. Vårt mål är att kunna ge besked under maj månad om du blir en av dem som får en praktikplats hos oss för hösten 2026. Säkerhetsprövning kommer att genomföras innan slutlig överenskommelse om praktik.
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan om praktik**
 Du ansöker genom att registrera din ansökan i vårt rekryteringsverktyg nedan. Din ansökan ska innehålla CV och ett personligt brev om max 1 A4 där du besvarar följande frågor:
   

  

* Varför du är intresserad av praktik hos oss på Murphy?
* Vad har du för mål och förväntningar och önskar lära dig under din praktik?
* Vad kan du bidra med?


 Bifoga också gärna ett intyg som styrker att praktiken ingår i din utbildning, att du är antagen till en praktikkurs eller att du deltar i ett arbetsmarknadspolitiskt program.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan senast den 13 maj.
   

  

**Kontakt:**
 Varmt välkommen att kontakta Miriam på miriam.van.baalen@murphysolution.com om du har frågor. Vänligen notera att vi endast tar emot ansökningar genom verktyget.

title: Senior Data Engineer
description:

title: Business Solution Architect
description:
We’re looking for a
 **Business Solution Architect** 
 to join us at Telia.
   

  

 I’m
 **Márcio Saeger** 
 ,
 **Head of Architecture** 
 in B2B Product Tech area, and I’m searching for someone ready to grow with us. We’re a supportive, forward-thinking team focused on developing and operating common B2B products and services supporting Telia to grow revenues and stay relevant & forward leaning in a constant changing Telco world.
   

  

**What you’ll do:**
 As a
 **Business Solution Architect** 
 , you will act as the functional and solution-level bridge between business requirements and technical implementation. You will be on the driver seat of our
 **Solution Integration** 
 area by ensuring the right requirements and architecture decisions are being taken along with our stakeholders.
   

  

* Responsible for shaping the Solution Integration area roadmap by balancing countries requirements x Life-cycle management.
* Act as the primary business architect for Solution Integration area, aligning with Technology Product organization on overall product development. Collaborate closely with stakeholders across business, product and technology teams to ensure architectural alignment and support for strategic objectives.
* Proactively challenge complexity, standardize integration patterns and drive reuse of common building blocks (“build once, deploy/use many”) when navigating multi-stakeholder and multi-country scenarios.
* Drive modernization of the Solution Integration area by supporting decoupling legacy components and accelerating cloud-native/container-based evolution.
* Apply deep enterprise integration experience from complex, brownfield environments (many upstream/downstream systems and multiple sub-applications) to make pragmatic architecture choices, reduce coupling, and guide stakeholders toward scalable integration outcomes.
* Secure non-functional requirement design (SLOs for performance, availability, reliability) and through automated checks.
* Support product, ART, and stand-alone teams by providing architectural/business guidance, clarifications, supporting EPIC and feature breakdown, and ensuring best solution design.
* Embed security by design and oversight for ISO 27001/SOC2/GDPR/NIS2
* Stay abreast of industry trends and best practices, continuously assessing and evolving the architecture to maintain competitive advantage.


**What will help you thrive in this role:**
* With strong communication and stakeholder leadership, you navigate shifting constraints with pragmatism, and you stay hungry and curious—testing ideas and driving innovation to simplify complex challenges.
* University degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Systems, or related technical field.
* Minimum of 5 years of experience in the architecture area.
* Proven ability to translate business needs into solution direction, drive technology roadmaps and manage cross-functional architectural topics.
* Proven record working in complex integration environments.
* Strong knowledge of modern cloud native solutions, integration patterns, and cloud technologies.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to influence all levels of the organization.


**Join us to shape smarter living for people, businesses, and the planet**
 At Telia, we’re a team of 15 000 colleagues across the Nordics and Baltics, passionate about technology and connectivity. As a
 **Leading Telecommunications Operator** 
 &
 **Climate Leader** 
 , we drive change with large-scale, impactful projects while building a sustainable, inclusive world.
   

  

 Here, you can grow your skills,
 **lead meaningful projects, and thrive in a supportive, diverse environment.** 
 Whether you’re taking your first step or your next, Telia is a place to grow, belong, and make a real impact.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.
   

  

**Ready to make better happen?**
 We look forward to receiving your application by
 **2026-05-07** 
 . Please note that we might close the position earlier if we find the right candidate, so don’t wait too long to apply!
   

  

 If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our
 **Talent Acquisition Partner** 
 . Background and reference checks will be part of the process.
   

  

**Equal opportunities**
 At Telia, we recognize talent by professional skills and growth potential. We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status. Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where your uniqueness is our strength.
   

  

**Join us and let’s make better happen - together!**

title: Salesforce Consultant
description:
At Remotion, we help companies turn complex customer data, CRM platforms, and marketing technology into real business value. We combine sharp strategy with hands-on execution - and we’re now looking for Salesforce Consultants to strengthen our team and play a key role in our continued growth.
 



  





 We’re looking for consultants at different stages of their careers - from those with a few years of experience to more senior profiles - who want to grow, contribute, and make a real impact together with us.
 



  





 This is a role for someone who enjoys being close to both clients and solutions - someone who can advise at a strategic level while also understanding how things get built and delivered.
 



  





**About the Role** 




 As a Salesforce Consultant at Remotion, you will be a trusted advisor to our clients, helping them unlock the full potential of Salesforce Marketing Cloud.
 



  





 You will work in the intersection of business, technology, and customer experience, taking ownership of both client relationships and solution delivery.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Act as an advisor to client stakeholders on MarTech, customer data, and digital transformation
* Lead and deliver Salesforce projects - from analysis and solution design to implementation and rollout
* Translate business needs into scalable and sustainable Salesforce solutions
* Drive business development by identifying opportunities and expanding existing client engagements
* Build long-term client relationships based on trust, quality, and results
* Contribute to developing Remotion’s Salesforce and MarTech capabilities
* Support (and potentially lead) the growth of our Salesforce team over time



  





**You Likely Have** 



* 3+ years of experience working with Salesforce
* Hands-on experience with Marketing Cloud Engage or Marketing Cloud Next
* Experience in building and growing MarTech capabilities aligned with client and market needs
* Experience working with broader MarTech ecosystems
* A strong track record of delivering successful Salesforce projects
* Experience in managing stakeholder relationships and building trust at multiple levels
* Fluency in Swedish and English, both written and spoken (required)



  





**It’s a Plus If You Also Have** 



* Experience working in other key products in the Salesforce stack such as Data360, Sales Cloud, Service Cloud
* Experience in solution architecture or leading larger implementations
* Salesforce certifications
* Experience working with MS Dynamics



  





**What We Offer** 



* A key role in a growing consultancy where you can make real impact
* A flat, entrepreneurial environment with high autonomy and trust
* The chance to work on meaningful, business-critical transformations
* Flexibility in how and where you work



  





**Why Remotion?** 




 We’re not a large, process-heavy organization. We’re a consultancy built on expertise, curiosity, and real client impact. We believe:
 



  




* Simplicity beats complexity
* Senior people should work closely with clients
* The best solutions come from understanding both business and technology



  





 If you’re looking for a place where you can influence, build, and grow - not just deliver - this is it.
 



  





**Interested?** 




 We review applications continuously, so don’t wait to apply:
 



 https://career.remotion.se/jobs/7644340-salesforce-consultant

title: EIB Trainee - Inspectorate General Directorate - Investigations Division - based in Luxembourg
description:
This position is based at our Luxembourg headquarters and requires regular office presence. The EIB offers you the opportunity to live and work in a truly international and multi-cultural environment.
   

  

 The EIB, the European Union's bank, is seeking to recruit for its
 **Inspectorate General (IN) - Investigations Division (IN) - Fraud Investigations-Intake&Analysis Unit (INTAKE&ANALYSIS)** 
 at its headquarters in Luxembourg:
 **TRAINEE**
***Duration: 5 months (fixed start date: 1st September/October 2026)***
***(With possible extension up to 6 months if required by University)***
***Please note that, as marked on our Webpage, only applications from nationals of the Member States of the European Union, as well as citizens from countries that have been officially granted candidate status to join the EU, can be considered (Albania, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Georgia, Moldova, Montenegro, North Macedonia, Serbia, Turkey and Ukraine).***
***Candidates whose Erasmus+ programme overlaps with the duration of the traineeship will not be considered.***
***Please note that you are requested to limit your applications to a maximum of three traineeship publications. We will only consider and retain the first three applications submitted.***
 Objective of the traineeship
   

  

 The objective of the traineeship is to provide hands-on experience in supporting investigative intake, digital forensic, and analytical processes, while contributing to the unit’s work through data analysis, automation, and the application of emerging technologies, including artificial intelligence.
   

  

 The traineeship further aims to support and enhance the unit’s investigative and analytical functions by strengthening data processing, digital analysis, and automation capabilities. Under supervision, the trainee will assist in processing and analysing information, developing technical solutions, and producing structured analytical outputs, while gaining practical experience in handling sensitive data within an investigative environment.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Under the responsibility of the Head of the Intake & Analysis Unit, you will contribute to the day-to-day and long-term performance of digital forensic and analytical work through the following activities:
   

  

* Assist in conducting data mining and analytical procedures using appropriate tools to support investigative activities.
* Assist in the implementation and operation of e-Discovery and digital forensic processes, particularly for the handling and analysis of large datasets.
* Develop and maintain scripts (primarily in Python) to automate routine processes, data extraction, and data cleaning tasks.
* Contribute to coding and scripting activities to improve workflows and data processing capabilities.
* Design and implement basic automation solutions using tools such as Microsoft Power Automate to streamline operational processes.
* Support the integration of APIs to enable interoperability between systems and tools.
* Assist in integrating AI-enabled tools and services into investigative and analytical workflows.
* Support the development, testing, and deployment of AI or machine learning solutions on cloud platforms, under supervision.
* Participate in analysing and interpreting outputs generated by AI tools, contributing to reports and insights.
* Assist in automating open-source research (OSINT) processes where appropriate.
* Assist in preparing structured summaries and drafting preliminary (zero-draft) assessment and investigation reports based on available data and templates.
* Perform other related duties as required in support of the unit’s mandate.


**Academic Qualifications And Professional Skills**
* Final year of studies or University degree in Computer Science, Data Science / Analytics, Information Systems, Digital Forensics or related fields.
* Good knowledge of Python (for data extraction, cleaning, scripting and automation) is required.
* Excellent knowledge of standard Microsoft Office tools (in particular Word and Excel).
* Excellent knowledge of written and spoken English. Knowledge of other EU language would be an advantage.


 Competencies
   

  

 Find out more about
 **EIB core competencies** 
 here
   

  

 By applying for this position, you acknowledge the importance of maintaining the security and integrity of the Information of the EIB Group. In case of selection for the position you agree to comply with all measures (policies, controls, document classification and management) implemented by the EIB Group to prevent unauthorized disclosure of any information or any damage to the EIB Group reputation.
   

  

 We are an equal opportunities employer, who believes that diversity is good for our people and our business. We encourage all suitably qualified and eligible candidates to apply regardless of their gender identity/expression, age, racial, ethnic and cultural background, religion and beliefs, sexual orientation/identity, disability or neurodiversity.
   

  

 Applicants with specific needs are encouraged to request reasonable accommodations at any stage during the recruitment process. Please contact the EIB Traineeship Recruitment team hr\_traineeship\_recruitment@eib.org who will ensure that your request is handled.
   

  

**Your Application May Be Used For Another Campaign.**
**Please note that deadline for application is on the May 12th, 2026.**
***More information on our***
***EIB Traineeship Programme***
***and***
***Provisions for In-service training***
***can be consulted on our EIB website;***
 https://www.eib.org/en/about/careers/categories/traineeship-and-graduate.htm

title: ServiceNow Senior Technical Consultant
description:
Är du en erfaren ServiceNow-specialist som vill vara med på en spännande resa?
   

  

 B3 Now är ett av B3 Consulting Groups nyare specialistbolag, med fokus på ServiceNow. Hos oss blir den del av en start up–miljö där energi, nyfikenhet och innovation präglar vardagen. Du får möjlighet att leda komplexa implementationer, designa smarta lösningar och leverera affärsvärde på riktigt hos våra kunder.
   

  

 Som
 **Senior Technical Consultant** 
 hos B3 Now blir du en del av ett engagerat team av ServiceNow specialister. Du arbetar i projekt och uppdrag med stor påverkan hos nationella och internationella kunder inom bland annat tillverknings industrin, retail, finans, energi, telekom och offentlig sektor.
   

  

 Din roll handlar om att skapa värde, från design och konfiguration/utveckling till implementation och rådgivning. Du tar ansvar för att bygga robusta lösningar på ServiceNow-plattformen som hjälper våra kunder att automatisera processer och driva digital transformation.
   

  

 Du kommer bland annat att:
   

  

* Översätta funktionella krav till tekniska lösningar med fokus på prestanda, skalbarhet och långsiktig hållbarhet.
* Designa och implementera lösningar enligt ServiceNows best practices.
* Bidra till vidareutveckling av våra interna metoder, kompetenser och leveransmodeller.
* Arbeta nära kundens verksamhet för att skapa lösningar som kopplar ihop teknik och affärsvärde.
* Vara en del av ett kompetent och stödjande team som gärna delar kunskap och hjälper dig utvecklas.
* Arbeta med rådgivning.


 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du är både tekniskt erfaren och affärsmässig, som kan bygga broar mellan teknik och verksamhet.
   

  

**Vidare ser vi att du har följande kvalifikationer:**
* Relevant akademisk examen eller motsvarande.
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av att konfigurera, utveckla och implementera lösningar på ServiceNow-plattformen.
* Relevanta certifieringar inom ServiceNow.
* God kunskap om webbtjänster (REST, SOAP), XML och JSON.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska.
* Kommunikativ, problemlösande och resultatorienterad.
* Kreativ och förmågan att analysera och lösa komplexa utmaningar.


**Vi erbjuder:**
* Attraktiv och flexibel lönemodell.
* Möjlighet att påverka dina arbetstider och arbetsplats.
* Utbildning för din professionella utveckling.
* En stark wellness-satsning genom Team B3, som främjar både hälsa och arbetsglädje.
* Kollegor med höga ambitioner och olika bakgrunder, ett inkluderande och internationellt mindset.
* En utmanande roll med stora möjligheter att växa tekniskt och professionellt.
* En kultur där vi både levererar värde till våra kunder och har roligt tillsammans.
* Möjlighet att påverka, bidra och vara med och forma framtiden för B3 Now.


**Om B3 Now**
 På B3 Now tror vi på att kombinera yrkesstolthet med glädje. Vi drivs av att göra skillnad, både för våra kunder och våra kollegor. Vi bygger en miljö där lärande, samarbete och utveckling står i centrum, och där du får utrymme att växa i den riktning du vill.
   

  

 Vi investerar i din kompetens genom utbildningar, mentorprogram och kontinuerlig coaching. Vi tror att när du utvecklas, utvecklas även vi.
   

  

 B3 Now är en del av B3 Consulting Group, ett av Sveriges snabbast växande konsultbolag. Med kontor i Sverige, Norge, Polen och internationella samarbeten hjälper vi organisationer att maximera värdet av ServiceNow genom smarta, skalbara och effektiva lösningar.
   

  

 Vi är över 1000 specialister globalt i koncernen – och växer snabbt. Hos oss får du både tryggheten av en stor aktör och närheten i ett mindre bolag där du har stort inflytande.
   

  

**Kontakt**
 Är du redo att ta nästa steg i din karriär? Ansök nu! Har du frågor är du välkommen att kontakta Stefan Saarnak.
   

  

 +46 76 725 7059

title: Senior Fullstack Engineer - Javascript
description:

title: Backend Engineer
description:
*Kreditz is transforming how businesses assess credit and risk using real-time data and NextGen Credit Scoring solutions.*
*As one of Europe’s fastest-growing FinTech scaleups - we’ve earned a place on the* 
***Sifted 100: Nordics & Benelux***
*list in both 2024 and 2025 and most recently, we were proud to receive a* 
***double win at the Credit Management & Compliance Awards 2025***
*, being named both "* 
***Fintech Rocket of the Year***
*" and "* 
***Breakthrough of the Year***
*".*
*With strong growth across the Nordics and Europe, our clients range from leading banks and iGaming giants to fast-moving digital innovators.*
**About The Position**
 Kreditz is looking for a
 **Backend Engineer** 
 to join our Tech team.
   

  

 In this role, you will design, develop, and evolve scalable backend services as we modernize our infrastructure. You will play an important role in shaping backend architecture, defining clear APIs between services, and ensuring our platform remains robust, secure, and efficient in a high-growth FinTech environment.
   

  

 We're looking for someone who wants to help transform a high-performing fintech platform into a billion-dollar business.
   

  

**What Can Kreditz Offer**
* A once-in-a-lifetime growth journey, from startup to Global scaleup
* A journey where everyone in the team plays a crucial role for our company’s success
* Fun-loving, driven, and passionate colleagues who support each other’s success
* A culture that celebrates progress, humility, and teamwork
* We win together
* 24/7 access to gym, sauna and sports facilities at our office, plus additional wellness allowance
* Competitive base salary


**RESPONSIBILITES**
**Some Of The Main Responsibilities You Will Cover**
* Design, develop, and maintain backend services and APIs
* Define and evolve backend architecture, including service boundaries and API contracts between microservices
* Build and deploy services on AWS using ECS, Fargate, and Service Connect.
* Collaborate closely with product and engineering teams to design scalable, maintainable solutions.
* Implement and maintain automated tests and CI/CD pipelines.
* Work with serverless technologies (AWS Lambda) for event processing.
* Perform code reviews and contribute hands-on to projects.
* Leverage AI agents and tools to enhance development workflows and productivity.
* Document system architecture, development processes, and integrations.


**WE ARE LOOKING FOR**
 A motivated and skilled Backend Engineer who enjoys solving complex problems and is comfortable working in a fast-paced, evolving environment. You have strong backend fundamentals and architectural thinking, and you enjoy designing systems that scale.
   

  

**We Believe That You Have**
* A Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, IT, or equivalent practical experience.
* 5+ years of experience in backend development.
* Experience with Go (or willingness to pick it up quickly)
* Experience with cloud platforms, preferably AWS (ECS, Fargate, Service Connect)
* Strong experience in API design (REST and/or gRPC) and defining service contracts (OpenAPI)
* Experience designing backend architectures in microservice-based systems
* Experience with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).
* Familiarity with containerization (Docker/Podman).
* Familiarity with messaging and event-driven systems (SQS, SNS)
* Experience with databases like PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, DynamoDB.
* Familiarity with monitoring and observability tools (CloudWatch, OpenTelemetry, X-Ray).
* Proficiency with Git and version control workflows.
* Excellent English communication skills (Swedish is a plus).
* Interest in using AI agents and tools as part of daily development work


**Nice To Have**
* Experience with Ruby on Rails and/or Python
* Experience working in FinTech or other regulated environments


**WHY JOIN NOW?**
 At Kreditz, you'll have the opportunity to work in a cutting-edge, fast-growing FinTech company that's redefining the credit scoring industry. With the backing of major investors and a clear vision for the future, your work will make a real impact on financial inclusion worldwide. Join us and be a part of something truly transformative!
   

  

**APPOINTMENT OF ROLE**
 Q1 2026
   

  

**SCOPE**
 Full-time, permanent employment (tillsvidareanställning)
   

  

**SALARY**
 Competitive salary
   

  

**REPORTING**
 You will be reporting to the company’s VP Engineering
   

  

**WORKPLACE**
 Danderyd, Stockholm
   

  

**RECRUITMENT PROCESS**
 Ongoing selection, we review candidates continuously.
   

  

*Last day for applications 31st March 2026*
**CRIMINAL RECORDS EXTRACT**
 As part of our recruitment process we will ask you to present a clean criminal records extract
   

  

**CONTACT**
 Lorenzo Puccio, VP Strategic Operations, Lorenzo@kreditz.com
   

  

 For more information about the role feel free to reach out to our Co-founder/CTO, arlen@kreditz.com
   

  

 Intelligent credit- & risk decisions made easy with open banking & AI-technology

title: Senior ML Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Job Description**
* Design, develop, and deploy scalable machine learning products with a focus on online prediction.
* Build and maintain infrastructure and tooling as a platform for data scientists.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate ML solutions into production systems.
* Monitor and maintain the performance and reliability of ML models post-deployment.
* Stay current with the latest advancements in machine learning and related technologies.


 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in the office will be confirmed by your Hiring Manager.
   

  

 Visa requires at least 3 days in office, expectations of these days will be confirmed by your Hiring Manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Basic Qualifications: 5+ years of relevant work experience with a Bachelor’s Degree or at least 2 years of work experience with an Advanced degree (e.g. Masters, MBA, JD, MD) or 0 years of work experience with a PhD, OR 8+ years of relevant work experience. Preferred Qualifications: 5+ years of relevant work experience with a Bachelor’s Degree or at least 2 years of work experience with an Advanced degree (e.g. Masters, MBA, JD, MD) or 0 years of work experience with a PhD, OR 8+ years of relevant work experience. Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field. Comfortable work with multi-cloud setup and experience with AWS or/and GCP and containerized environment like Kubernetes. Solid understanding of machine learning lifecycle and fundamentals. Expertise in Python. Familiarity with Terraform, GitHub and GitHub Actions. Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail. Experience with Vertex AI, specifically in online prediction. Experience with Cloud Run and Workload Identity Federation. Experience with kubeflow pipelines Experience with Triton inference server and TensorRT Understanding of data security and privacy regulations.
   

  

**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Finance Partner- Tieto Tech Consulting
description:
Jobbeskrivning
   

  

 The Finance Partner provides senior-level financial expertise and acts as a trusted business partner for Tech Consulting. The role is responsible for planning, coordinating, and controlling operational finance activities within an assigned scope, supporting management decision-making and performance management.
   

  

 Operating in a complex, international environment, the Finance Partner applies Tietoevry-defined finance processes, tools, and governance models, while continuously improving ways of working and strengthening Finance’s value contribution to the business.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Plan and coordinate operational finance activities within the assigned Tech Consulting area.
* Define and execute FC&A plans, objectives, and forecasts in line with business goals.
* Monitor financial performance against targets and proactively communicate insights, deviations, and improvement opportunities to business management.
* Act as a trusted Finance Business Partner to senior stakeholders, supporting profitability, investments, and operational decision-making.
* Apply and support the implementation of Tietoevry finance tools, methods, and processes, ensuring consistency and compliance.
* Drive continuous improvement of finance processes and ways of working, incorporating relevant market best practices.
* Collaborate closely with Finance colleagues and cross-functional partners across the organization.
* Contribute finance expertise to cross-organizational initiatives when required.


**Qualifications & Experience**
* 8–12+ years of relevant experience in Finance, ideally within Finance Business Partnering, Controlling, or senior Finance specialist roles.
* Strong overall finance competence, with advanced expertise in areas such as controlling, forecasting, and performance management.
* Experience from publicly listed companies and compliance-driven environments is an advantage.
* Experience working in international, multicultural organizations is preferred.
* Proven ability to influence decisions through financial expertise, data, and professional credibility.
* Strong analytical skills with the ability to improve existing processes and ways of working.
* Strong stakeholder management skills and a collaborative mindset.


 Ytterligare information
   

  

 At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.
   

  

 Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)

title: UR söker en AI-ansvarig (Head of AI)
description:
Vill du bli motorn bakom vårt strategiska AI-arbete och leda utvecklingen som tar UR in i framtidens användning av kunskapsmedia? Nu söker UR en AI-ansvarig (Head of AI) med ett helhetsansvar för att samordna, driva och maximera nyttan av artificiell intelligens i vår verksamhet, både kopplat till produktion, sökbarhet och interna processer.
   

  

 Det här är en nyinrättad roll, vilket ger dig möjlighet att sätta din egen prägel på hur vi arbetar smartare, kreativare och mer effektivt! Du blir en del av ledningsgruppen för avdelningen Kommunikation & Digital och arbetar företagsövergripande med uppdragen.
   

  

**Ansvar i rollen**
* Strategiskt AI-ledarskap: Äga och implementera en plan för hur AI kan stödja UR:s långsiktiga mål – att dubblera användningen till 2028.
* Samordning och utbildning: Fungera som intern expert och bollplank över avdelningsgränser. Kompetensutveckla, inspirera och stödja kollegor i verksamhetsutveckling inom AI-relaterade arbetssätt och lösningar.
* Innovation och effektivisering: AI ska användas och implementeras i organisationen, och rollen fungerar som en katalysator för att identifiera var AI skapa mervärde i form av ökad användarnytta – från innehållsproduktion och automatisering av administrativa flöden till gränssnitten ut mot användarna.
* Omvärldsanalys och partnerskap: Hålla dig uppdaterad om de senaste teknologiska trenderna och utvärdera relevanta samarbeten eller investeringar. Vara UR:s kontaktperson i AI-relaterade frågor.
* Etik och ansvarsfull AI: Säkerställa att all AI-användning sker på ett säkert, transparent och etiskt ansvarsfullt sätt.


**Vad vi erbjuder dig?**
 Hos oss får du möjlighet att jobba i ett spännande bolag som har ett unikt kunskapsuppdrag. Genom att förena berörande journalistik och effektiv pedagogik skapar UR program som hjälper människor till ny och bestående kunskap.
   

  

 Som AI-ansvarig blir du en nyckelperson i en nyinrättad roll där du har stor frihet att forma både innehåll och arbetssätt. Du får arbeta tvärfunktionellt med engagerade kollegor, vara med och bidra till UR:s strategiska utveckling och påverka hur kunskapsmedia utvecklas med hjälp av AI. Vi erbjuder en dynamisk arbetsmiljö där vi värderar öppenhet, kompetensutveckling och balans mellan arbete och fritid.
   

  

 ,
   

  

* Högre utbildning inom relevant område (t.ex. datavetenskap, medieteknik, informationssystem eller liknande).
* Gedigen erfarenhet av AI/ML-lösningar – både tekniskt och affärsmässigt.
* Förmåga att kommunicera tekniska möjligheter och risker till olika målgrupper på ett pedagogiskt och engagerande sätt.
* Dokumenterat ledarskap i förändringsarbete eller processutveckling, gärna i mediemiljö.
* Stark analytisk förmåga och god vana att tillsammans med andra omsätta insikter till praktiska lösningar.


**Erfarenhet**
* Erfarenhet av att initiera och leda verksamhetsutveckling i AI-relaterade projekt från idé till implementering, gärna inom mediebranschen eller liknande kreativa miljöer.
* Van att arbeta i tvärfunktionella team, gärna i byggandet av nya arbetssätt och utveckla kompetenser.
* Meriterande med praktisk erfarenhet av val och implementering av AI-verktyg och plattformar.
* Kännedom om juridiska & etiska frågor kopplade till AI och datahantering ser vi som ett plus.


**Låter detta som din nästa utmaning?**
 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan och är nyfikna på hur just dina erfarenheter kan bidra till vår AI-resa. Välkommen med frågor eller din ansökan senast 17 maj. Vi går igenom ansökningar och genomför intervjuer löpande under ansökningstiden.
   

  

 För frågor gällande tjänsten, kontakta rekryterande chef Catarina Myhrman, chef för Kommunikation & Digital (catarina.myhrman@ur.se) eller Per Bergkrantz. vice VD och Strategichef (per.bergkrantz@ur.se).
   

  

 Fackliga frågor besvaras av Unionen, Saco och Journalistförbundet via växeln 08–784 40 00.

title: Project and Partner Lead - Carla Partner Services
description:
**Om Carla**
 Carla vill sätta en helt ny standard för hur man köper och säljer elbil. Vi accelererar omställningen till hållbar mobilitet genom att erbjuda det mest kundvänliga sättet att äga, sälja eller köpa elbil – helt digitalt, tryggt och smidigt. Vårt mål är att det ska kännas lika enkelt och säkert att köpa en bil online som allt annat man klickar hem på nätet. Självklart är alla bilar laddbara.
   

  

 Sedan lanseringen i Stockholm 2021 har Carla vuxit snabbt. Vi är idag Sveriges näst största aktör inom begagnade elbilar och är på väg mot över 2 miljarder i omsättning under 2026.
   

  

 Vår partneraffär, Carla Partner Services (CPS), är en av de mest strategiska motorerna för vår fortsatta tillväxt, där vi tillsammans med Nordens största banker, leasingbolag och biltillverkare skapar skalbara, högkvalitativa remarketinglösningar för framtidens elbilsmarknad.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Vill du bygga upp och driva ett av Nordens mest spännande affärsområden inom hållbar mobilitet? Brinner du för att skapa skalbara partnerskap med banker, leasingbolag och ledande biltillverkare? Vill du ansvara för den dagliga leveransen för Carlas snabbast växande affärsområde? Då kan du vara vår nästa Project and Partner Lead Carla Partner Services Manager med ansvar för att säkerställa att vi levererar på topp mot våra partners varje dag, lösa problem och driva projekt för att kvalitetssäkra vår partneraffär – från daglig drift till långsiktig tillväxt.
   

  

 Du rapporterar till CCO och Co-founder Niklas Jungegård och tar direkt ansvar för att driva partnerskap, projekt och affärsresultat med tydlig impact från dag ett.
   

  

**Du Ansvarar För Att**
* Vara primär kontaktpunkt för våra största partners och att arbeta internt i skärningspunkten mellan affär, operations, logistik, teknik och ekonomi
* Varje dag, för varje bil, leverera en tjänst i toppklass genom att identifiera problem, och själv eller tillsammans med andra hitta smarta lösningar
* Att rapportering, SLA:er, fakturering och uppföljning är knivskarpa - både löpande och genom att sammanställa material till möten med partners
* Att vi ständigt identifierar nya möjligheter att växa affären, både med befintliga och nya partners
* Leda tvärfunktionella uppstartsprojekt
* Ständigt leta efter möjligheter att förbättra interna processer, verktyg och ansvarsområden, och att få saker gjorda genom andra


**Vem vi söker**
* En strukturerad, affärsdriven och serviceinriktad person som trivs där affär möter operations. Du besitter konsten att hantera många bollar i luften, och älskar att leverera med precision. Vi tror att rätt person har:
* Minst tre års erfarenhet av projektledning inom komplexa B2B-tjänster, med en stark förmåga att identifiera både problem och möjligheter, och få saker gjorda tillsammans med andra
* Starkt intresse för siffror, processer och människor
* Mycket goda analytiska kunskaper och en förmåga att både analysera och skapa sifferunderlag
* Mycket god kommunikativ förmåga
* Starkt sinne för struktur, och en respekt för att det är i detaljerna vinsten oftast ligger


**Det är meriterande om du har:**
* Erfarenhet från branscher med en hög digitaliseringsgrad, kombinerat med fysiska flöden (Instabox, Budbee, Northvolt, Voi m.fl.)
* Arbetat med partners inom bilhandel-, leasing- eller banksektorn
* Projektlett komplexa leveranser med många stakeholders
* Byggt och förbättrat processer, rapporteringsverktyg eller digitala lösningar


**Omfattning**
* Heltid
* Arbetsplats: Stockholm HQ


**Vi erbjuder:**
* Ta ägarskap över en affärskritisk funktion
* Vara med och forma arbetssätt och struktur från grunden
* Jobba nära affären i ett bolag med högt tempo och stora ambitioner
* Utvecklas i en miljö där vi ständigt utmanar status quo


 Vi är blixtsnabba, både när det gäller bilvärderingar, leveranser och rekryteringar- så ansök idag!
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

title: AI Researcher, Post Training
description:
**TL;DR:**  

Lovable lets over 2 million people build software using plain language, and the models behind it need to be exceptional. We're hiring an engineer who has gotten their hands dirty with post-training at scale and wants to do it again for one of the fastest-growing AI products in the world.


You'll own our full post-training pipeline: translating the latest research into production training recipes, adapting them for code generation and agent workloads, and putting improved models in front of users fast. The goal is to get promising research into production within days or weeks, not months. This isn't an academic research position - you'll spend as much time in production infrastructure as in training configs, and your success is measured by what ships.

**Why Lovable?**


Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, automate work, and bring their ideas to life. And we’re just getting started.


We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.

**What we’re looking for**

* You've personally run post-training jobs on large language models - RFT/RLVR, preference optimization, or similar. Not just called APIs or written prompts, but actually trained and iterated on models
* You can write solid production code. The systems you build need to run reliably, not just produce interesting research artifacts
* You're fluent in at least one major ML framework (PyTorch, JAX) and comfortable working with distributed training setups and GPU clusters
* You understand the math behind preference optimization, reward modeling, and alignment techniques - and can reason about when each approach fits
* You've built or significantly contributed to evaluation systems that capture real-world quality, not just benchmark scores
* You can trace a model quality regression from user-facing symptoms back through serving, inference, and training - and you enjoy doing it
* You want to ship. Research taste matters, but at Lovable the question is always "how fast can we get this to users?"

**Preferred:**


* You've worked on code generation or agentic use cases specifically
* You've put post-trained models into the hands of real users and seen how they hold up at scale
* You've owned the full loop: curating data, running training, evaluating results, deploying, and monitoring in production
* You have a habit of reading a paper on Monday and having a prototype running by Friday
* You've experimented with speculative decoding or similar techniques to improve model efficiency
* You have strong views on evaluation methodology and have built evals that actually predict user satisfaction
* You've published or contributed meaningfully to the open-source ML ecosystem

**What you’ll do**

* Own the full lifecycle of Lovable's post-training pipeline - from data curation and training runs through evaluation and deployment
* Apply and adapt reinforcement learning, preference optimization, and supervised fine-tuning methods to make our models better at generating code, reasoning about user intent, and acting as reliable agents
* Build the evaluation and experimentation infrastructure that tells us whether a model change actually helps users - covering helpfulness, safety, latency, and reliability
* Develop and operate the production systems that run training jobs at scale, including GPU orchestration and data pipelines
* Work across team boundaries with our agent, product, and infrastructure engineers to turn model gains into product improvements users can feel
* Investigate and resolve failures end-to-end - whether the root cause is in a training recipe, a data issue, or a serving regression
* Read papers, run experiments, and move fast: the goal is to get promising research into production within days or weeks, not months

**About your application**


Please submit your application in English. It’s our company language, so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join.


We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested, please apply through our careers portal.

2026-04-28

Full time

**The Opportunity**

Seize this opportunity to take on a highly visible position in a global organization. As a Junior Power System Engineer you will belong to Power Consulting, a department within Hitachi Energy working with both internal and external clients in the energy sector. You will be part of a renowned global team of power system and energy consultants. In the role, you will have the opportunity to contribute to the green transition and create a more sustainable energy future for all.


So, if you want to take the next step in your career, and contribute to develop a stronger, smarter, and greener energy system – Join us now! We are interested to learn more about you and what you can contribute with so don’t hesitate to apply even if you don’t meet all the requirements. A team with great cooperation and with diverse backgrounds is waiting for you to join it


**How you'll make an impact**

* In this exciting role, you will get the opportunity to take part in major assignments related to the green energy transition together with our consultants and experts from local as well as international Power Consulting offices.
* The assignments for the role are mainly system studies within the area of HVDC, FACTS, renewable energy integration, green hydrogen and power systems in general.
* As a Power Systems Engineer, you are expected to take lead in assignments towards clients and to provide effective support in ongoing projects.
* Cooperation and work in teams with leading specialists together with Hitachi Energy well-defined career path ensures exciting and motivating career with fast development along own interests and personality traits.
You will be living Hitachi Energy core values of safety and integrity, which means taking responsibility for your own actions while caring for your colleagues and the business.  
* 

**Your Backgroun**

* You hold a Master’s degree in electrical engineering, electrical power systems or similar.
* You have a great interest and preferably three years of experience in the consulting and energy sector.
* Knowledge in power systems analysis and in software simulation tools such as PSS/E, PSCAD and/or DIgSILENT PowerFactory.
* Programming skill in Python, C++, etc. is a merit.
* You have an analytical mindset, you are independent, self-going and take your own initiatives to solve problems.
* As a person, you are collaborative and communicative.
Fluent in English and Swedish  
* 

**What we offer**

* Collective agreement
* Flexible working time
* Health care and wellness allowance
* Fantastic career possibilities within Hitachi Energy both within Sweden and globally
* Mentor to support you throughout onboard phase
* Various trainings and education supporting employee development
* Diversified company with over 70+ nationalities working in Sweden
* Supplementary compensation for parental leave
* Employee Benefit Portal with thousands of discounts and perks

**More about us**

The position is based in Stockholm (Solna) or Gothenburg.


We are interested to learn more about you and what you can contribute with so don’t hesitate to apply even if you don’t meet all the requirements. A team with great cooperation and with diverse backgrounds is waiting for you to join!


Applications will be reviewed on an ongoing basis, so don’t delay – apply today!

title: QA Engineer
description:
**About Air Apps**
==================


At Air Apps, we believe in thinking bigger - and moving faster. We’re a family-founded company on a mission to create the world’s first AI-powered Personal & Entrepreneurial Resource Planner (PRP), and we need your passion and ambition to help us change how people plan, work, and live. Born in Lisbon, Portugal, in 2018 - and now with offices in both Lisbon and San Francisco - we’ve remained self-funded while reaching over 100 million downloads worldwide.


Our long-term focus drives us to challenge the status quo every day, pushing the boundaries of AI-driven solutions that truly make a difference. Here, you’ll be a creative force, shaping products that empower people across the globe.


Join us on this journey to redefine resource management - and change lives along the way.

**The Role**
============


As a **QA Engineer** at, you will play a key role in ensuring the **quality**, **reliability**, and **performance** of our mobile applications. You’ll focus on building r**obust automated tests** and **strengthening API testing processes** while still performing hands-on functional validation when needed.


Working closely with developers, product managers, and designers, you’ll help identify issues early, expand test coverage, and implement scalable testing strategies that guarantee a smooth and stable user experience.


Your role will be essential in **detecting bugs, verifying feature implementations, automating tests, and validating software stability before deployment**.

* This is a **fully onsite position**, based at our office in Lisbon, where you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams in person and contribute to a dynamic and fast-paced environment. **We are open to support with relocation efforts.**

**Responsibilities**
====================

* Perform **manual testing** on web and mobile applications to ensure a seamless user experience.
* Perform **API tests** and **automation** using **Postman.**
* Creating and maintaining **Postman documentation**.
* Create and execute **automated regression, functional, performance, and API tests**.
* Develop and execute **detailed test plans, test cases, and test scripts**.
* Document and report bugs, working closely with developers to resolve issues.
* Ensure **feature compliance** by validating product requirements against test results.
* Identify **edge cases, inconsistencies, and performance issues**.
* Work with **cross-functional teams** to improve software quality throughout the development lifecycle.
* Provide **clear and structured feedback** to enhance product functionality and user experience.
* Maintain test documentation and contribute to **quality assurance best practices**.

**Requirements**
================

* Around **3+ years** of experience in **manual and functional testing**.
* Strong understanding of **QA methodologies, testing types, and best practices**.
* Experience with **test case management tools** (e.g., TestRail, Zephyr, Xray).
* Proficiency in **test automation frameworks** (e.g., Selenium, Cypress, Appium, Playwright).
* Strong experience in **programming languages** such as **Python, Java, JavaScript, or TypeScript**.
* Familiarity with **bug tracking systems** (e.g., Jira, Trello, Bugzilla).
* Experience in testing weband **mobile applications** (iOS & Android).
* Strong attention to detail and ability to **identify complex usability issues**.
* Experience with **API testing** (e.g., Postman).
* Ability to work in an **agile development environment** and adapt to changing priorities.
* Strong communication and collaboration skills.

**What benefits are we offering?**
==================================

* **Apple hardware** ecosystem for work.
* **Annual Bonus**
* **Top-tier Health and Life Insurance** for peace of mind.
* **Transportation Budget** to support your commute needs.
* **Coverflex** benefits package for meal allowances, well-being, and more.
* **Childcare** support.
* **Air Conference** - an opportunity to meet the team, collaborate, and grow together.
* **Pension Fund** to support your long-term financial planning.
* **Urban Sports Club** membership to keep you active.
* **Meals 100% free** at the hub.

**Diversity & Inclusion**
=========================


At Air Apps, we are committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable workplace. We enthusiastically welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We celebrate diversity in all its forms and believe that varied voices and experiences make us stronger.

**Application Disclaimer**
==========================


At Air Apps, we value transparency and integrity in our hiring process. Applicants must submit their own work without any AI-generated assistance. Any use of AI in application materials, assessments, or interviews will result in disqualification.


Compensation Range: €44K - €56K
